flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Salem University rose 39% between 2017 and 2020 ($17.8k → $24.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Salem University fell 36% between 2021 and 2024 (31.0% → 19.9%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Salem University fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (20.6% → 16.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Salem University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.3% → 0.0%).
